name: Eglise de Notre Dame des Anges
description: A stunning Greco-Roman style church that is the only one in Puducherry to offer mass in three languages: French, Tamil, and English. It closely resembles the Basilica at Lourdes in France.
history: Constructed in 1855 by Napoleon III. It is famous for its smooth limestone interior mixed with the whites of eggs.
famousFor: Greco-Roman architecture, Joan of Arc statue.
